thread.title: Deep Research (调研型 agent)
thread.definitionDraft: Deep Research is a class of research agent: given a complex question, the agent autonomously runs a multi-hop loop of plan → iterative web search → read → cross-verify → synthesize a long, cited report, compressing hours of desk research into minutes.
thread.whyNow: After Google first shipped it (2024-12) and OpenAI followed (2025-02), Deep Research evolved within a year from a report-writing assistant into an autonomous agent that reasons while it searches and decides how deep to go — the first killer product form that fuses reasoning models with agentic search, and a yardstick (BrowseComp) for long-horizon agent autonomy.
thread.useBoundary: Focus on the autonomous multi-hop research loop of a single research task (plan/search/read/verify/synthesize). Exclude general multi-agent collaboration (multi-agent-orchestration) and code-writing agents (agentic-coding).

sourceRequirements.companyStrategyContextPolicy: Company strategy sources may be kept only as optional company_strategy_context targets and must not count toward topic readiness.

sources.title: Google launched its deepest AI research agent yet — same day OpenAI dropped GPT-5.2
sources.whyRelevant: Google 把 Deep Research 从写报告助手升级为自治研究 agent，巨头同日对垒的竞速信号。
sources.text:

sources.title: Introducing deep research
sources.whyRelevant: OpenAI 官方发布页，给出权威定义：用 reasoning 综合在线信息完成多步研究。
sources.evidenceQuote: An agent that uses reasoning to synthesize large amounts of online information and complete multi-step research tasks for you.
sources.text:
Introducing deep research

Evidence note: An agent that uses reasoning to synthesize large amounts of online information and complete multi-step research tasks for you.

edges.evidenceNote: Search-o1 把 ReAct 的"推理-行动交错"专门用到大推理模型的自主补知识上。
OpenAI Deep Research 的"把问题拆成子任务再逐步研究"正是 self-ask 思想的产品化。
BrowseComp 是 OpenAI 官方用来量化 Deep Research 浏览-检索能力的基准。
OpenAI 2025.02 发布是对 Google 2024.12 首推 Deep Research 品类的同台跟进。
Anthropic orchestrator-worker 并行 subagent 架构与 LangChain 开源实现的多 agent 设计互证。
Search-o1 的 agentic search 循环在 gpt-researcher 的 planner→executors→publisher 工程中落地。
同一产品线从 2024.12 写报告助手演进到 2026.04 整夜自治尽调，体现"自治深度"递进。

review.notes: Deep-core 2026-06-21: 17 sources / 7 edges, arXiv ids verified (2210.03629=ReAct, 2210.03350=Self-Ask, 2501.05366=Search-o1). 1 transcript (perplexity computer blog) at source_pack_review pending fulltext capture. OpenAI urls fetched via firecrawl (corp policy blocked direct WebFetch). Roles all >=2.
